---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an educational, research, or public-understanding improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user need or public-understanding gap should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature, page, metric, dataset, or workflow.

## Data Requirements

List any sources that would be needed. New climate values, rankings, analogs, or
enrichments require source-registry coverage and documented limitations before
they can be shown.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The result is understandable to a general audience.
- [ ] The result is scientifically traceable.
- [ ] Missing or uncertain data is handled visibly.
